summary: ConfigurationManager.AddConfiguration2 fully characterized (7-arg signature proven, configs created and persisted). Per-config equation/dimension route BLOCKED: --no-dim build mode creates all features with 'All Configurations' scope. IsAppliedToAllConfigurations=True on all dimensions. SetSuppression2 leaks to all configs. VERIFY THE EFFECT not achievable with current build mode.

IConfigurationManager.AddConfiguration2.signature: (Name, Comment, AlternateName, Options, ParentConfigName, Description, Rebuild)

IModelDoc2.AddConfiguration2.signature: (Name, Comment, AlternateName, SuppressByDefault, HideByDefault, MinFeatureManager, InheritProperties, Flags)

IConfiguration.GetParameterCount.note: Returns config properties ($DESCRIPTION, $COLOR), NOT equation variables

makepy_traps_found.trap: AddConfiguration2 on IConfigurationManager has 7 args, NOT 3
makepy_traps_found.fix: Pass all 7 args: (Name, Comment, AltName, Options, ParentConfigName, Description, Rebuild)

makepy_traps_found.trap: GetConfigurationNames is on IModelDoc2, NOT IConfigurationManager
IConfiguration.GetParameters returns config properties, not equations

blocker.issue: IsAppliedToAllConfigurations=True on all dimensions in --no-dim build
blocker.impact: Per-config dimension values and feature suppression leak to ALL configs
blocker.root_cause: --no-dim build creates features with global scope; dimensions are not scoped per-configuration
options: A: Build in parametric mode (currently blocked by AddDimension2 popup — needs popup suppression research)
B: Post-build: set per-config scope on dimensions/features before applying overrides (requires discovering the API to change config scope)
C: Use configuration-specific features instead of dimension overrides (e.g., add/remove features per config)
D: Defer per-config volume verification to a follow-up spike that resolves the scope issue

offline_scaffold_status.create_all: SEAT-gated (structure complete, _create_one needs live-seat per-config route)

configs_verified.creation: GREEN — AddConfiguration2 creates configs that persist through save/close/reopen
configs_verified.naming: GREEN — GetConfigurationNames returns correct list after creation
configs_verified.distinct_volumes: RED — per-config overrides do not produce distinct volumes
